topic: OpenAI's Codex plugin for Claude Code — product analysis, workflow fit for SoNash project, and strategic implications
subQuestionsAnswered: SQ-2: What is the Claude Code plugin — features, architecture, who built it?
SQ-5: Plugin vs Claude Code standalone comparison
keyThemes: Cross-provider sycophancy protection as core value proposition
Windows blocking bugs make plugin unreliable for user environment
Review gate is silently broken and inadvisable for SoNash
Level 1 SKILL.md approach as lower-friction validation path
Multi-model development is now mainstream industry practice
Security: full repo reaches OpenAI cloud; patched CVE; dual attack surface
Strategic: OpenAI building into Anthropic ecosystem as distribution play

consumerHints.immediateAction: Do not install plugin — Windows blockers active. Start with Level 1 SKILL.md approach instead.
consumerHints.securityAlert: Review gate creates data intermingling between OpenAI and Anthropic; use API key not subscription for training protections
